water.name: Caples Creek
aliases: Caples Creek below Caples Lake Dam

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 1667303, "Caples Creek", Stream, CA, El Dorado/Alpine Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":1667303,"gaz_name":"Caples Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Alpine"/"El Dorado","objectid_1":1395071,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13378986.4653, 4677509.7225 → 38.69103°N, 120.18548°W) at the confluence with the Silver Fork American River. Corrects prior file coordinates (-120.15, 38.74), which were roughly 6.3 km northeast of the actual mouth and appear to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull; the corrected point is corroborated by the Wikidata coordinate for Caples Creek (GNIS ID 1667303), 38°41'28"N 120°11'8"W (38.69111°N, 120.18556°W).

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.50(b)(24) — Caples Creek from the confluence with the Silver Fork American River upstream to Caples Lake Dam (El Dorado and Alpine Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (24) Caples Creek from the confluence with the Silver Fork American River upstream to Caples Lake Dam (El Dorado and Alpine Cos.) All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet, updated June 1, 2026)
sources.quotedText: (24) Caples Creek from the confluence with the Silver Fork American River upstream to Caples Lake Dam (El Dorado and Alpine cos.) All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release only, on Caples Creek from its confluence with the Silver Fork American River upstream to Caples Lake Dam.
Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used; no bait.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
